hooks.statusMessage: Checking CLAUDE.md is up to date...
hooks.command: input=$(cat); if printf '%s' "$input" | grep -Eq '"stop_hook_active"[[:space:]]*:[[:space:]]*true'; then exit 0; fi; printf '{"decision":"block","reason":"Session ending. If the codebase changed this session, before stopping: (1) update CLAUDE.md to reflect it - mark completed checklist items, add any new files/folders/routes/endpoints/collections, and correct outdated info; (2) commit CLAUDE.md; (3) push to origin. If nothing in the codebase changed this session, do not edit anything - just stop."}'
